title: Admin signs in and reaches the authenticated session
description: Verifies an admin can log in with valid credentials and the app loads the authenticated session user afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email or username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated session user is loaded
Verify the user lands on the authenticated app

title: Expired session can be refreshed without losing user context
description: Verifies an authenticated user can refresh access and continue using the app with the current user still available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email or username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the session to require refresh
Continue the current session
Verify the authenticated session user remains loaded
Verify the app remains accessible without returning to login

title: Authenticated user can log out and end the session
description: Verifies an authenticated user can log out and the session is no longer available afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email or username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the account menu
Click the logout action
Verify the user is returned to the login screen
Verify the authenticated session is ended

title: Current session can be signed out from all devices
description: Verifies an authenticated user can end all active sessions and the current session becomes invalid afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email or username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the account menu
Click the sign out all sessions action
Verify the user is returned to the login screen
Verify the current session is no longer valid

title: Admin updates a user's role from the edit drawer
description: Verifies an admin can open a user drawer, see the full role catalog, change the assigned role, save, and observe the updated role after the drawer is reopened.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email or username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the user management drawer for an existing user
Change the user's role
Save the user changes
Reopen the same user
Verify the updated role is shown for the user
Verify only the assigned role is selected

title: Invalid login shows a failure message
description: Verifies an admin sees a login failure message when submitting invalid credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email or username field with invalid-user
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the login form
Verify a login failure message is visible
Verify the authenticated app is not entered

title: Admin sees validation errors when required user fields are missing
description: Verifies an invalid user update keeps the drawer open and maps backend validation errors to the relevant fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email or username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the user management drawer for an existing user
Clear a required user field
Save the user changes
Verify the user form remains open
Verify field-level validation errors are visible

title: Admin can correct an invalid role selection and save successfully
description: Verifies a user edit with invalid role data can be corrected in the same drawer and then saved successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email or username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the user management drawer for an existing user
Choose an invalid role option if available in the form
Save the user changes
Correct the role selection to a valid role
Save the user changes
Verify the updated user record is saved
Verify the form no longer shows validation errors

title: Health check confirms the backend is ready
description: Verifies support or ops users can check backend health and see a healthy readiness state before running dependent workflows.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:5184/api/health (backend API, not the frontend port)
Verify a healthy backend status is displayed
Verify the backend is marked as ready

title: Health check surfaces an unavailable state
description: Verifies the health monitoring view shows an unavailable state when the backend is not healthy.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:5184/api/health (backend API, not the frontend port)
Verify an unavailable backend status is displayed
Verify dependent checks are blocked
